title: Design system + map experience
scope: Implement docs/design-direction.md across the app: font pairing (Bricolage Grotesque/Hanken Grotesk/IBM Plex Mono via next/font), palette + radius + soft-depth shadow tokens in Tailwind/shadcn theme, full-bleed map-first landing (no marketing hero), muted basemap treatment, four score-layer toggles (overall/accessibility/drainage/shade) with per-layer colorblind-safe ramps + line-width channel, always-visible legend with value bins, floating panel with live hero stat, segment click detail panel with per-item breakdown + photo placeholders, smooth fly-to, bilingual strings via next-intl. MUST consume data ONLY through the adapter contract in lib/segments.ts (getSegments/getSegmentDetail/getStats) — do not restructure data files.

conventions.commits: atomic, explicit pathspecs, as you go
conventions.quality: npm run build && npm run lint green before done
conventions.branch: unit/u1-design-map (push allowed), never touch main or next
